description: A factory near my house in Delhi is emitting heavy black smoke causing concern.

messages.text: Hello! Welcome to the Grievance Registration System. I am here to help you register your complaint today. May I know your full name please?

Thank you, [Name]! Could you tell me which category your issue falls under?
Is it Water Supply, Electricity, Road, Sanitation, Network, or something else?
My number one is my heart.

It seems there might be some misunderstanding. I'm a grievance registration agent, and I'm here to help with issues related to government services. It seems like you might be referring to a personal concern rather than a service-related issue.

However, if you're experiencing any issues with a service that's causing you distress or discomfort, I'd be happy to help you with that. Could you please try to rephrase or reexplain your issue in a way that's related to a specific service, such as Water Supply, Electricity, Road, Sanitation, Network, or something else?

Nice to meet you, Nagraj! Now that I have your name, could you please specify which category your issue falls under? Is it a problem with:

Water Supply
Electricity
Roads and Sanitation
Network (Internet, Phone, etc.)
Police and Safety
Health Services
Something else?

Please let me know, and I'll do my best to assist you.
I am in Delhi. A factory near my house is emitting heavy black smoke in Delhi.

Nagraj, thank you for sharing that with me. I understand that the heavy black smoke from the factory near your house is causing concern for you.

Could you please describe what exactly is happening with the smoke? Is it a constant issue, or is it intermittent? Are there any specific times of the day when the smoke is worse? And how is it affecting your daily life, if at all? 

Also, have you already reported this issue to anyone, such as the local authorities or the factory management?

Nagraj, to report the issue of pollution from the factory, you can contact the Pollution Control Committee of Delhi.

You can reach them at their helpline number: 011-24355000 or 011-23978046

You can also file a complaint on their website: [www.dppc.delhigov.nic.in](http://www.dppc.delhigov.nic.in)

Additionally, you can also contact the Delhi Pollution Control Committee's online complaint portal: [app.dppc.delhigov.nic.in](http://app.dppc.delhigov.nic.in)

Please note down the complaint number for future reference and follow up.

I will also help you create a formal complaint
